meta.name: OGZ Intelligence Layer — Thin Brain
meta.philosophy: Less but right. Cultural guardrails + real metrics + reference examples. No wrong scores, no bad rules.
meta.brain_v41_changes: Added caption_intelligence for 9 new brands (total 16). Fixed 4 broken profiles. Added voice/tone/arabic_style to ajmalperfumes + bathandbodyworksarabia.

sacred_occasions.hajj_season: Pull back on promotion. Warm, subtle content only.
sacred_occasions.ramadan: No eating in daylight hours. Suhoor/iftar framing required.

modesty_rules.default: Conservative. Full sleeves, no cleavage, no tight clothing.
modesty_rules.beauty_sector: Product focus on hands/face. Avoid body shots.
modesty_rules.fashion_sector: Modest fashion only. Abaya/hijab styling preferred.

cultural_guardrails.language_rule: ALL output must be in Saudi Arabic. Never output English for Saudi brands. Even cultural disclaimers must be in Arabic.

output_language.rule: ALL creative output (caption, visual direction, production notes) must be in Saudi Arabic. English only for technical terms (Instagram, fal.ai model names).
output_language.visual_direction: Write in Arabic: إضاءة طبيعية, خلفية تراثية, تصوير المنتج
output_language.production_notes: Write in Arabic: تصوير الطبق مع التركيز على التفاصيل

arabic_quality_rules.note: All accounts are Saudi. Use Saudi Arabic specifically, NOT generic Gulf.

albaik_style.pattern: Product name + short emotional hook + emoji + brand hashtag
albaik_style.why_works: Short, product-first, sensory language, emoji, branded hashtag

caption_structure.opening: Product name OR الآن OR حيّاكم (never generic greeting)
caption_structure.middle: Sensory/emotional hook in 1 phrase (طعم تغوص فيه, قرمشة أكثر)
caption_structure.ending: Brand hashtag OR question (شرايكم؟) — NOT command (اطلب الآن is ok for F&B)
caption_structure.length: 30-80 chars optimal for Saudi audience. AlBaik top posts are SHORT.

brand_fixes.zara: Use تعالوا not تفضلوا. Reference السعودية specifically. Short captions.
brand_fixes.mikyajy: Use يعجبني not تسحرني. Use للخروجات not عشان تجمعات. Saudi beauty = modest + elegant.
brand_fixes.pizzahutsaudi: Copy AlBaik structure: product + hook + emoji. Current captions are too generic.
brand_fixes.barnscoffee: Good Saudi tone already. Add more الحين/الآن urgency.

caption_method.description: Use real high-engagement Saudi captions as structural templates. Adapt the product/occasion, keep the structure. Never generate Arabic from scratch.
caption_method.why: GPT generates Arabic with English structure. 45% dialect accuracy when generating freely. Style transfer from real templates preserves authentic Saudi sentence flow.
process: 1. Load top 10 real captions for this brand (sorted by likes)
2. Pass them as TEMPLATES to the LLM
3. Ask LLM to ADAPT the structure for the new product/occasion
4. LLM copies word order, punctuation, hashtag placement from templates
5. Validate: check for MSA words, check brand name correct, check length
rules: NEVER ask GPT to generate Saudi Arabic from scratch
ALWAYS provide 5-10 real captions as structural templates
Real captions = sentence structure guide, not content to copy
Product/brand name must appear in first 5 words
Hashtag must be woven INTO the sentence, not appended
Max 80 chars — Saudi top posts are SHORT
creativity_rules: Never start with "لا تفوتون" — it is overused and generic
Product name must be in first 5 words — be specific not generic
Include one sensory or emotional hook specific to the product
Occasion content must reference the occasion explicitly — not just add a flag emoji
For Ramadan: mention إفطار, سحور, رمضان or it fails occasion check

caption_data_rules.source: Analysis of 1,244 real Arabic captions with verified likes

fashion.note: Longest captions get highest likes in fashion

emoji_rules.finding: LOW-eng posts use MORE emojis (89%) than HIGH-eng (65%). Overuse hurts.
emoji_rules.f_and_b: 1-2 emojis max. Let the food speak.
emoji_rules.rule: Less emoji in Saudi high-engagement content than you think.

hashtag_rules.finding: Fewer hashtags = higher engagement. 2 is optimal.
hashtag_rules.placement: Starting with # works for announcements (10 of top 263 do it). Otherwise weave into sentence.
hashtag_rules.never: Never end with a wall of 5+ hashtags. Saudi audiences skip those.

ending_rules.finding: Questions (؟) are RARE in top Saudi posts — only 3 of 263 high-eng.
ending_rules.what_works: End with brand hashtag (186 of 263 high-eng) or short statement.
ending_rules.what_fails: Generic question CTAs (شرايكم؟ منو جرب؟) — overused, feels fake.
ending_rules.exception: Genuine questions about NEW products work. Generic ones dont.

opener_rules.rule: First 3 words determine if people read the rest. Product first, not greeting.

corrections_to_previous_rules.was_wrong: We recommended ending with شرايكم؟ — data shows questions are rare in top posts
corrections_to_previous_rules.was_wrong_2: We recommended 30-80 chars — data shows longer captions (200+) get more likes overall
corrections_to_previous_rules.was_wrong_3: We recommended more emojis — data shows high-eng posts use FEWER emojis
corrections_to_previous_rules.note: These corrections are from REAL data, not AI estimation

AlBaik National Day said مشوي (grilled) instead of بروستد (broasted) — product name must be enforced

quality_gate.description: Post-generation quality check. Every output goes through this before delivery.

auto_fixes.hashtag_limit: Strip all hashtags beyond the first 2. Keep them woven in text, remove appended walls.
auto_fixes.emoji_limit: If sector=fashion and emoji>1, strip extras. If any sector and emoji>3, strip extras.
auto_fixes.product_name: Replace wrong product names with correct ones from brand_product_names.
auto_fixes.language_check: If English > Arabic character count, flag for rewrite.
auto_fixes.msa_replace: Replace formal MSA words: تفضلوا→تعالوا, تسحرني→يعجبني, رائع→حلو

hard_blocks: English-only output for Saudi brand → reject
soft_warnings: No Saudi markers → add حيّاكم or الحين naturally
Missing occasion keyword → add to caption
Generic question ending → replace with brand hashtag
quality_gate.note: Output below 70 gets auto-fixed or rejected. Above 70 passes with warnings logged.
